articles.title_en: Oil on the beaches, drone attacks, gasoline shortages: Russia’s Black Sea coast is now a perilous place to vacation. So why do Russians keep coming?
articles.lead_en: The summer vacation season on Russia’s Black Sea coast is under threat for the second year running. In 2025, authorities in Anapa banned swimming and sunbathing on local beaches after two tankers carrying fuel oil were wrecked, triggering an environmental disaster along the coastline.

articles.lead_raw: Ukraine has struck most of Russia’s oil refineries in recent months, leading to acute fuel shortages in some parts of the country.

articles.title_en: Russia’s FSB says it foiled a 35-drone attack near Moscow and blames Ukrainian intelligence — and a rapper living in the U.S.
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had thwarted a large-scale drone attack on a strategic facility “in a residential area of the Moscow region,” the Russian state news agency TASS reported.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s FSB says it foiled a 35-drone attack near Moscow and blames Ukrainian intelligence — and a rapper living in the U.S.
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had thwarted a large-scale drone attack on a strategic facility “in a residential area of the Moscow region,” the Russian state news agency TASS reported.

articles.title_en: Ukrainian drones spark fires at two Russian refineries overnight, including one of the country’s biggest petrochemical plants
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian forces attacked oil refineries with drones overnight into July 14, striking plants in Salavat, Bashkortostan, and in Afipsky, Krasnodar Krai.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian drones spark fires at two Russian refineries overnight, including one of the country’s biggest petrochemical plants

articles.title_en: Trump will support bill on anti-Russia sanctions — CNN
articles.lead_en: If passed by Congress, the document would pave the way for the administration to impose tariffs on countries purchasing Russian oil, according to the report
articles.title_raw: Trump will support bill on anti-Russia sanctions — CNN
articles.lead_raw: If passed by Congress, the document would pave the way for the administration to impose tariffs on countries purchasing Russian oil, according to the report

articles.title_en: Kursk drivers can now buy gasoline only on days matching their license plate numbers. The governor says the new rule protects them from Ukrainian strikes.
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Kursk region will start rationing fuel by license plate number on July 15, Governor Alexander Khinshtein announced.
